commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds wrapper inference and preservation to gateway install planning and service audit, threads existing service argv through install/doctor callers, and adds wrapper-preservation regression coverage.

Reproducibility: yes. as a source-level reproduction path: current main audits wrapper-only ProgramArguments as missing `gateway` and builds service plans without consulting argv-only wrappers. The PR body also supplies before/after real macOS evidence, though I did not run a live LaunchAgent update in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: A narrow automated repair can address the remaining blocker by passing existing ProgramArguments through start repair and adding regression coverage.

target.title: Preserve wrapper-backed gateway services during doctor repairs
target.author: legarconc
